

add to "easystaff ru" project replies suggestions time slots for shcheduling a demo meeting


I need to add suggestions of selection time in slots when the lead wants to book a call with me, so that, like before, operator was looking into calendar slots of sales team person. Make this sales team people visible in project knowledge page. So for now, only EasyStaff.ru EasyStaff.ru project has this knowledge basis, has this currently set up. So what is the logic? Logic is that, like described below, so that add, like, Russian text below is how operator currently solved it, but what I suggest to do? When operator needs to provide time to choose, why time to choose is better than just calendar link, as people usually more easily agree to schedule a call without clicking on any external links. Like as quick as we can, the speed of actions for a person improves conversion rate. So that conversion for this approach with time slots is higher than just sending calendar links, you see. So, at the right, on the like, next to the right panel, right, right now, in the result, in the reply, you add to this calendar block, by default, by default, for all leads, for all leads that needed to be scheduled a call, for instance, in meeting tab, it should add to the text of the reply suggestion the available slots. But, for instance, if a person is on vacation or some emergency, operator might just need to choose, and it should be like a selected drop-down on the right, I mean, in the bottom of the right panel, now having calendar section. And, for instance, Ekaterina, default calendar slots are suggested, and Ekaterina is selected on the right. But maybe operator need to select these time slots for, not for Ekaterina, but for... But for like Eleonora, so operator can click on selecting this just selectable drop-down Eleonora, and Eleonora slots, so it will trigger regeneration of the suggestion reply with Eleonora slots. Or by selecting Ekaterina, back to Ekaterina's slots. You know what I want to do? Act as God, architecture and UX.

logic example
все имеющиеся слоты у Кати в три ближ дня, т.е сегодня я дам на ср, чт, пт (зависит от того, что лид просит, если середины след недели - то вт, среда, чт, если конец - среда, чт, пт)

если у кати мало слотов то сразу из нескольких календарей даю


message example

Подскажите, пожалуйста, подойдут ли какие-то из этих слотов вам по CET? 

04.03 с 9:00 - 12:00
05.03 с 8:00 - 16:00
06.03 с 8:00 - 10:30 / 11:30 - 14:30
